assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet unless the goal explicitly requires an existing artifact.

developer_goal: Create a Scaleway account, provision a first Linux CPU Instance, and establish an authenticated SSH session.

first_success.outcome: A Linux CPU Instance is running and the developer has an authenticated SSH session as root.
first_success.observable_signal: ssh to the Instance IP opens an interactive root shell.

route_selection.surface: Scaleway console account creation and Instances quickstart
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Console signup then Instances quickstart with uploaded SSH key
candidates.reason: Account-type choice changes profile fields; payment and identity-verification timing for a first Instance are not fully fixed publicly.

candidates.name: Alternate account-type or verification branch
candidates.reason: Official docs show account-type decisions and possible later verification that can change path length.

required_path.action: Create a Scaleway account and complete required profile steps.

required_fields.label: Profile and contact fields for the chosen account type

required_path.observable_result: The Scaleway console Organization and default Project become available.

required_path.action: Add billing information required before resource creation when prompted.
required_path.observable_result: Billing is ready for Instance creation.

required_path.action: Generate or upload an SSH key into the Project.
required_path.observable_result: The Project has an SSH key available for Instances.

required_path.action: Create a Linux CPU Instance with unresolved zone and plan defaults.
required_path.observable_result: Scaleway creates the Instance and assigns a public IP.

required_path.action: Connect over SSH as root with the Project private key.

required_fields.label: ssh command with private key and Instance IP

prerequisites.description: Billing setup is required before creating billable resources.

external_gates.description: Payment-provider authorization and possible identity verification for quota or risk.

unavoidable_waits.description: Account confirmation and Instance provisioning readiness.

platform_outcomes.description: Scaleway creates Organization and Project structures after signup.
Scaleway provisions the Instance and publishes its IP.

excluded.reason: Reading is not a counted product action.

sources.title: How to generate an SSH key pair

uncertainties.question: Which account-type profile fields, payment timing, and identity-verification triggers apply to a fresh first Instance?
uncertainties.impact: These gates change required fields and whether first success needs manual review.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account console walkthrough covering signup fields, billing prompts, and Instance create controls.

uncertainties.question: Which zone and Instance plan should be the universal lowest-friction default?
uncertainties.impact: Availability and pricing differ by zone and plan.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official default recommendation that is currently universal for new accounts.
